title: stevia cruziana
intro: Stevia cruziana, also known as Stevia guaymallenensis, is a species of stevia native to South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant contains compounds like stevioside and rebaudioside, which are used for their medicinal and health benefits. The medicinal properties of Stevia cruziana include its ability to act as an antidiabetic and an antihypertensive, while its health benefits include its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Stevia cruziana can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and powdered extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
